calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Health is present. Represented by Andelia Garcia
Attorney, Arnold Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Konstantin Hanff , is present.
Attorney, Michael Monagle , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-04-2010 is vacated.
